seoTitle: Maxwell vs Maybole — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maxwell and Maybole. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maxwell and Maybole.
heading: Maxwell vs Maybole — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maxwell, New South Wales and Maybole, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maxwell has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Maybole (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maxwell or Maybole safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maxwell has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Maybole scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maxwell scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Maybole scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maxwell or Maybole?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maxwell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
